Detailed Description

C object mirroring the java.lang.Class class

Enumeration Type Documentation

enum class_state_t

Loading state of a class

Enumerator:
CS_DUMMY 

Initial state of a newly allocated & cleared class.

CS_PRELOADED 

Preloading, this may happen during bootstrap.

CS_LINKING 

Linking, this happens during class resolution.

CS_LINKED 

Class has been resolved & linked but not initialized.

CS_INITIALIZING 

The class is being initialized.

CS_INITIALIZED 

The class has been initialized.

CS_ERRONEOUS 

The class is an erroneous state.

Definition at line 126 of file class.h.

const field_info_t *  info,
const field_attributes_t *  attr

Adds a field to the class

info A pointer to the information of the new field
attr A pointer to the field attributes of the new field

field_t* class_get_field ( const class_t *  cl,
const char *  name,
const char *  descriptor,
bool  stat 
)

Finds a field by its name and descriptor, this function will only look for the field inside the specified class, not its parents

Parameters:
cl A pointer to the class where to look for the field
name The field name
descriptor The descriptor name
stat true if the field looked for is static, false otherwise
Returns:
A pointer to the field or NULL if none was found
